# Support and Feedback


This page explains where to get help, request enhancements, and report defects.

## Get the Software

Use the install and quickstart guides:

- [Getting Started](https://livon.tech/docs/core/getting-started)
- [Packages Overview](https://livon.tech/docs/packages)
- [Contributing](https://livon.tech/docs/core/contributing)

## Bug Reports and Enhancement Requests

Use GitHub issues for bugs and feature requests:

- Issues: https://github.com/live-input-vector-output-node/livon-ts/issues

When opening an issue, include:

- affected package(s),
- expected behavior vs actual behavior,
- minimal reproduction steps,
- environment details (Node, OS, browser/runtime where relevant).

## Discussions

Use repository discussions for architecture and API design proposals:

- Discussions: https://github.com/live-input-vector-output-node/livon-ts/discussions

## Response Expectations

Maintainers aim to:

- acknowledge new bug reports in a timely way,
- provide follow-up questions or triage labels for reproducible issues,
- close resolved reports with clear rationale.

Security vulnerabilities must use private channels, not public issues.
See [Security and Vulnerability Reporting](https://livon.tech/docs/core/security).
